description:
Perform an outlier exclusion task on the 'age' variable in the BFI-25 dataset using 'BFI25.csv'. Exclude all cases where the age is more than 2 standard deviations above the mean. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Age_Outlier_Removal.omv. Create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/outlier_report.txt containing exactly these 4 lines with the calculated values:
Original Mean: [value]
Original SD: [value]
Filtered Mean: [value]
Excluded Count: [number]
